name: Introduction to Computing
description: Introduction to problem solving and programming using Python.

name: Foundations of Computation I
description: Introduction to programming and computational thinking.

name: Foundations of Computation II
description: Continuation of programming fundamentals and data structures.

name: Introduction to the Foundations of Computation II
description: Problem solving, algorithms, and programming.

name: Practical Programming Methodology
description: Software development practices, C programming, and systems concepts.

name: Algorithms I
description: Algorithm design, analysis, and complexity.

name: Computer Organization and Architecture I
description: Computer organization, assembly language, and hardware fundamentals.

name: Basics of Machine Learning
description: Fundamentals of machine learning algorithms and applications.

name: Formal Systems and Logic in Computing
description: Logic, proofs, sets, and formal reasoning in computing.

name: Introduction to File and Database Management
description: Database design, SQL, and file management systems.

name: Introduction to Software Engineering
description: Software engineering principles, design patterns, and agile development.

name: Algorithms II
description: Advanced algorithms, graph theory, and computational complexity.

name: Operations Research I
description: Linear programming, optimization, and operations research methods.

name: Non-Procedural Programming Languages
description: Functional and logic programming paradigms.

name: Visual Recognition
description: Computer vision, image recognition, and deep learning for visual data.

name: Introduction to Scientific Computing
description: Numerical methods, scientific computing, and mathematical software.

name: Advanced Game Development
description: Game engine architecture, graphics, and interactive simulation.

name: Introduction to Information Retrieval
description: Search engines, text processing, and information retrieval systems.

name: Introduction to Reinforcement Learning
description: Reinforcement learning theory, algorithms, and applications.

name: Operating Systems Concepts
description: Operating system design, processes, memory management, and filesystems.

name: Introduction to Computer Graphics
description: 2D/3D graphics, rendering pipelines, and shader programming.

name: Database Management Systems
description: Advanced database systems, query optimization, and transactions.

name: Introduction to Software Product Design
description: Product design, UX, and building real software products.

name: Web Applications and Architecture
description: Full-stack web development, REST APIs, and web architecture.

name: Introduction to Natural Language Processing
description: NLP, text processing, language models, and AI for text.

name: Experimental Mobile Robotics
description: Robotics, sensors, autonomous navigation, and ROS.

name: Introduction to Multimedia Technology
description: Multimedia systems, compression, and streaming technologies.

name: Computer Architecture II
description: Advanced computer architecture, pipelining, and parallelism.

name: Machine Learning
description: Advanced machine learning, deep learning, and model evaluation.

name: Seminar in Machine Learning
description: Current research topics in machine learning.

name: Compiler Design
description: Compiler construction, parsing, code generation, and optimization.

name: Topics in Computing Science
description: Special topics in computing science research and applications.

name: Elementary Calculus I
description: Differential calculus of one variable.

name: Elementary Calculus II
description: Integral calculus and series.

name: Linear Algebra I
description: Vectors, matrices, linear systems, and determinants.

name: Linear Algebra II
description: Vector spaces, eigenvalues, and linear transformations.

name: Intermediate Calculus I
description: Multivariable calculus and partial derivatives.

name: Elementary Statistics I
description: Basic statistical concepts, probability, and data analysis.

name: Introductory Statistics for Engineering
description: Probability, distributions, hypothesis testing, and regression.

name: Particles and Waves
description: Classical mechanics, waves, and introductory modern physics.

name: Electromagnetism and Modern Physics
description: Electromagnetism, circuits, and modern physics.

name: Introductory University Chemistry I
description: Atomic structure, bonding, and chemical reactions.

name: Introduction to Biology I
description: Cell biology, genetics, and evolution.

name: Capstone Project
description: Final year capstone project in computing science.
